description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a sleek, minimalist design. The exterior features a combination of dark stone, wood paneling, and large glass windows, creating a contemporary aesthetic. The front includes a covered entryway, a garage, and a spacious wooden deck with outdoor furniture. The rear of the house opens onto a large patio area, ideal for entertaining, with additional seating and a barbecue setup. The windows are arranged in horizontal bands, maximizing natural light and providing expansive views. The house sits on a rectangular plot with a well-maintained grassy lawn surrounding it.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, dark stone and wood exterior, large glass windows, and spacious decks and patios.
description_view_0: This view shows the front of the house with the garage on the left, the main entryway, and a covered deck area.
description_view_1: This view highlights the rear of the house, featuring a large patio with outdoor furniture and wide glass doors.
description_view_2: This side view displays the garage, side entry, and the transition between stone and wood paneling.
description_view_3: This view shows the back and side of the house, emphasizing the flat roof and the solid stone garage structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large horizontal bands
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with a flat overhang, wide modern door, and adjacent garage
